description: A clinical operations manager needs to create a clinical trial agreement (CTA) for a new site and track its approval status.

nodes.task_description: Generate a new CTA for an investigator site using an approved legal template.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a draft CTA populated with the site's details and the study's budget.

nodes.task_description: Send the draft CTA to the site for their review and negotiation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the contract to the site's legal contact.

nodes.task_description: Receive a redlined version of the CTA from the site and route it to the internal legal department for review.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the redlined version and routes it to the legal team's work queue.

nodes.task_description: Track the CTA status until it is fully executed by both parties.

expected_outcome.value: Agent monitors the contract status, facilitates communication, and updates the status to 'Executed' upon completion.
